entity_evidence.text: The Director of Finance shall not approve any transfer of funding between the California Advanced Services Fund's Federal Funding Account, any other account or subaccount that is created to receive funding from the federal IIJA's Broadband Equity, Access, and Deployment (BEAD) Program, and any accounts for the Department of Technology's MMBI
